{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201642027FE6B0715D3AA59BC6E6"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605673074660786969","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常非常好看，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770847196,"group_id":"7590664318350281753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"因为鄙人是人，所以我是人。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+NLjaLm9K4aFQUaJyssx9silEOXsCaX7AUKe348xj8n","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/034eaedea321438bbb04d1002767a55f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532885&x-signature=gi2wxKqjSvBzXrmT2pE35mjUI7Y%3D","user_id":"4486436746168439","user_name":"UT老人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4486436746168439","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590664318350281753","book_info":{"abstract":"特殊事件，有私设，有CP，高甜微刀（不就是主角死了几次嘛）
别名：歧路之魂（Wayward Heart）
这毒品若是在人心里种下
便“无法”挽回，没有人能戒掉
预言开始：新的灵魂将拯救世界
这只是一个关于在无尽的绝望与混乱中，两个孤独的灵魂如何找到彼此、治愈彼此、并最终确认“爱”是超越代码与命运的真实存在的动人故事。
“就算我们是由代码构成，那也生成了超越代码之外的东西，它的名字叫：爱”
（借用：诗空茫。歌词）
这片星空写不下诗，却充满迷茫
于是我等在，你的身旁
就这样，不断失去，不断失语
我说不出口就一直逃避
无论如何都词不达意
可是太阳，永远，却也没有意义
我在千星，空隙，之间寻不见你
就连我的声音，就此化为无明
我写下太多都无法逃脱
星空之下万事缪落
花五万天等待，五万天徘徊
全部都对我说，一定会回来
带我泅渡过，茫茫的尘海
不用再满足，谁的期待
我困在了昨天，太羸弱触不到那彼岸
我的诗没有办法翻篇，却也渴求着永远","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/18476adfbec89592360092b1325e97a5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"聂小草莓","author_id":"","book_id":"7590664318350281753","book_name":"我是chara，也不是","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1400人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590664359202800153","read_count":"1400","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"826000"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"163","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,穿越,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/18476adfbec89592360092b1325e97a5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180122&x-signature=IZH8gBAwg7Ao2mNVIyv3N9biZCw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108665134399","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201642027FE6B0715D3AA59BC6E6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2173,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3895,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":519},"user_action":{"author":0,
